description: Map an organization's externally-visible footprint from the Whisper Security infrastructure graph. Surfaces registered domains, hosting IPs, prefixes, ASNs, and shared-infrastructure clusters to help security teams understand exposure before an attacker does.
title: Whisper Security - External Attack Surface Overview

description: Threat-weighted view of infrastructure enrichment: threat scores by ASN, prefix, and country; C2/malware/phishing prevalence; and pivoting from a single indicator to related infrastructure. Uses Whisper Security explain() reputation scores as the top-level signal.
title: Whisper Security - Infrastructure Threat Landscape

description: Track reputation drift across the ASNs you care about. Charts reputation-score trajectories, flags degradations, and lists prefixes on each ASN carrying the most threatening indicators. Uses periodic ASN polling data from Whisper Security.
title: Whisper Security - ASN Reputation Monitoring

description: Highlight registration-side anomalies from WHOIS history: registrar changes, registrant swaps, sudden movement to threat-linked ASNs, and short-lived domain patterns. Uses WHOIS snapshots and infrastructure context from Whisper Security.
title: Whisper Security - Domain Registration Anomaly

description: Auditing view for Whisper Security enrichment activity: playbook invocation counts, latency, error rate, and quota consumption. Helps operators verify that enrichment is running as expected and that API budget is under control.
title: Whisper Security - Incident Enrichment Audit
